title: acaena longistigma
intro: Acaena longistigma, also known as the hairy or long stigma caterpillar's hair, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. This plant is native to New Zealand and is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties. The leaves and roots of Acaena longistigma are used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues, fever, and inflammation, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. It can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures by herbalists, which are then used to promote overall health and well-being.
